DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC'S MOTION TO DEEM FACTS AS ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DEEM FACTS ADMITTED AND FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED IN PART AND GRANTED IN PART. THE DEFENDANT SERVED VERIFIED RESPONSES WHICH SUBSTANTIALLY COMPLY WITH CIV. PROC. CODE 2033.220. IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS MANDATORY AND ARE IMPOSED IN THE SUM OF $260.00 TO BE PAID BY THE DEFENDANT WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2019 Vacated

Notice Of And Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC's Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted.

Plaintiff's motion to deem facts admitted and for sanctions is denied in part and granted in part. The Defendant served verified responses which substantially comply with Civ. Proc. Code 2033.220. Imposition of monetary sanctions is mandatory and are imposed in the sum of $260.00 to be paid by the defendant within fifteen days of the date of this Order.

The Court will prepare an Order.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
